scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,yellow "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('backend/.env')) fs.copyFileSync('backend/.env.example','backend/.env');" && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend run db:migrate && npm --prefix backend run db:seed
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
